title: Converting SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Database Migration Service uses Gemini AI to help developers convert SQL Server database schemas and code to PostgreSQL. Gemini explains the conversion process (e.g., user-defined types to PostgreSQL DOMAINs) to build developer expertise.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video shows how Database Migration Service applies Gemini to convert SQL Server schemas and code to PostgreSQL. It covers the conversion of constructs such as user-defined types into PostgreSQL DOMAINs, with Gemini explaining each step rather than only producing output. The framing matters because the tool aims to build developer expertise during migration, treating the AI as a tutor for the conversion logic.
